<?php namespace Vonage\Client\Credentials\Handler; use Psr\Http\Message\RequestInterface; use Vonage\Client\Credentials\Basic; use Vonage\Client\Credentials\CredentialsInterface; class BasicHandler extends AbstractHandler { public function __invoke(RequestInterface $request, CredentialsInterface $credentials): RequestInterface { $credentials = $this->extract(Basic::class, $credentials); $c = $credentials->asArray(); $cx = base64_encode($c['api_key'] . ':' . $c['api_secret']); return $request->withHeader('Authorization', 'Basic ' . $cx); } }
